title: Delight Fresh Seeds
description: This is Addon to Fresh Seeds.
body:
![ㅤ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17cd3a78c87075c456c8f9c77af18373c77c7125.png)
This resource pack, build on [Fresh Seeds](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-seeds), and adds more 3D Items for Seeds for the [Farmer's Delight Mode](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight), these books contain models and textures.

It is based on the Fresh Seeds resource pack, which includes models for seeds

**This resource pack is under development, and may contain bugs**
